channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Jurors weigh evidence in high-stakes Meta trial about social media risks to children
item.description: A daunting stream of testimony and evidence has been presented in a New Mexico case that explores what the social media conglomerate Meta knew about the effects of its platforms on children.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft won’t force Copilot in everywhere after all
item.description: Microsoft has temporarily halted automatic installation of the Microsoft 365 Copilot app on Windows devices with Microsoft 365 desktop apps. The company announced the change via an update in Microsoft 365 Message Centre, but offered no indication when the measure would be reactivated.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 3 men are charged with conspiring to smuggle US artificial intelligence to China
item.description: A senior vice president of Super Micro Computer Inc. and two others affiliated with the company have been charged with conspiring to smuggle billions of dollars of computer servers containing advanced Nvidia chips to China.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister And Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: IDC: Dell leads server market driven by AI infrastructure needs
item.description: Despite tariffs and parts shortages, the server market reached a record $125.3 billion dollars in revenue during the fourth quarter of 2025, driven by the accelerated investment in AI Infrastructure, according to the International Data Corporation’s (IDC) Worldwide Quarterly Server Tracker.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Phishing scam exploits Apple Mail 'trusted sender' label
item.description: Apple Mail's "trusted sender" banner can reportedly mislead users into phishing scams. Learn how scammers exploit this security feature to deceive victims.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI could be suppressing wages for young workers
item.description: Growing AI adoption has slowed the hiring of young workers in software development and customer service jobs, and recent data suggests it could also be exerting pressure on entry-level wages, according industry experts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: USAT Introduces Digital Dollar Payments to Millions in Times Square St. Patrick’s Day Takeover
item.description: This St. Patrick’s Day, USAT is making the bridge to digital currency as short as a QR code scan. During a high-impact brand activation in the heart of New York City, USAT is taking over Times Square to show 2 million people how simple moving money can be.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Chip wafer shortage will run through 2030 as AI demand overwhelms supply: SK Hynix chief
item.description: The global shortage of semiconductor wafers will not ease before the end of the decade, SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won said, delivering one of the most definitive long-range forecasts yet from the executive of the world’s leading supplier of high-bandwidth memory chips.
item.dc:creator: Network World
